options.name: <blackBoxCellName>
options.description: name of the blackbox or blackblob cell

options.name: -cell
options.description: Specifies the name of the cell from which the load value will be picked

options.name: -inputPin
options.description: Specifies the input or inout pin of the cell

options.name: -lib
options.description: Specifies the name of the timing library

options.name: -multiply_by
options.description: Specifies the load value multiplication factor

options.name: -port
options.description: Specifies the name of the input port
